Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories And Requests For Production Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-16-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Laurel Mousseau, Attorney at Law, Tel. 415.987.0692, for plaintiff Glenda Moore;
John T. McGlothlin, of the Dept. of Justice, Office of the Attorney General, Tel. 510.622.2224, for defendants.

Ruling: A R G U E D. DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF CORRECTIONS AND Motion To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories And Requests For Production Request For Monetary Sanctions is granted. Within fourteen (14) days of entry of the Court's order, plaintiff shall serve complete verified discovery responses, without objections, and complete production of responsive documents. Sanctions of $600. is awarded to defendants. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Melinda Derish; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
